accountSettings.title: Settings
accountSettings.description: Manage your app preferences and account options
accountSettings.helpDescription: Review your notification preferences, language, privacy details, and account safety settings from one place.

myProfile.errorDescription: We couldn't load your profile. This might be due to a connection issue.
myProfile.title: My profile
myProfile.description: Manage your personal and professional information

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Update your password to keep your account secure

errors.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.lowerRequired: Must contain at least one lowercase letter
errors.upperRequired: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
errors.numberRequired: Must contain at least one number
errors.specialRequired: Must contain at least one special character

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.subtitle: We're sorry to see you go
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and you will lose access to all your data.
deleteAccount.loseAccess: Access to all events and updates

language.title: Language
language.applyNote: The app will apply the new language immediately.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.information_str: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, company information, and other details you submit through our application.
privacy.use_infoStr: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process grant applications, send you updates about events and opportunities.
privacy.sharing_str: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as described in this policy or with your consent.
privacy.security_str: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized or unlawful processing.
privacy.rights_str: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time through your account settings.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.acceptance_str: By accessing and using Vision PME, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
terms.license_str: Permission is granted to temporarily access the materials on Vision PME for personal, non-commercial use only.
terms.account_str: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account.
terms.privacy_str: Your use of Vision PME is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy, which also governs the site.
terms.grant_str: All grant applications are subject to review and approval. Vision PME reserves the right to accept or reject any application at its sole discretion.

subscription.subTitle: Subscription
subscription.unlimitedAppsDesc: Apply to all grants without limits
subscription.loseAccess: You'll lose access to all premium features immediately.
subscription.connectWallet: Please connect your wallet to cancel the subscription.
subscription.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? You will lose access to all premium features immediately.

subscriptionBanner.title: Unlock Premium Features
subscriptionBanner.description: Get unlimited grant applications, priority access to new events, and an ad-free experience.

subscriptionPlans.title: Vision PME Passeport
subscriptionPlans.subtitle: Unlock all features and opportunities
subscriptionPlans.trialSubtitle: No commitment. Cancel anytime during trial.
